courses.request:
SELECT SQL_CALC_FOUND_ROWS  wp_posts.ID
					 FROM wp_posts  LEFT JOIN wp_term_relationships ON (wp_posts.ID = wp_term_relationships.object_id)  LEFT JOIN wp_term_relationships AS tt1 ON (wp_posts.ID = tt1.object_id) JOIN wp_icl_translations wpml_translations
							ON wp_posts.ID = wpml_translations.element_id
								AND wpml_translations.element_type = CONCAT('post_', wp_posts.post_type) 
					 WHERE 1=1  AND ( 
  wp_term_relationships.term_taxonomy_id IN (280) 
  AND 
  tt1.term_taxonomy_id IN (86)
) AND wp_posts.post_type = 'course' AND ((wp_posts.post_status = 'publish')) AND ( ( ( wpml_translations.language_code = 'es' OR 0 ) AND wp_posts.post_type  IN ('post','page','attachment','wp_block','wp_template','wp_template_part','wp_navigation','course','university','popup' )  ) OR wp_posts.post_type  NOT  IN ('post','page','attachment','wp_block','wp_template','wp_template_part','wp_navigation','course','university','popup' )  )
					 GROUP BY wp_posts.ID
					 ORDER BY RAND(20260328) DESC
					 LIMIT 0, 12
